channel.title: DeepSeek on Rafelia's AI LOLs
channel.description: Recent content in DeepSeek on Rafelia's AI LOLs

item.title: 🧠 OpenAI’s o3-mini Now Explains Itself – AI With an Inner Monologue! 🤖💭
item.description: OpenAI finally lets us peek inside ChatGPT’s thought process—AI is now explaining itself, kinda. But is it really more transparent or just better at justifying its mistakes? 🤔
